heading: Built for Pakistani investors
subhead: Local context, plain English, and no commissions hiding in the margins.

props.title: Pakistani context
props.description: Every example uses PKR, FBR rules, KMI-30, and the brokers you can actually use in Pakistan. Not American or Indian playbooks.

props.title: Plain English
props.description: No jargon for jargon's sake. Every technical term links to a glossary entry written for first-time investors.

props.title: Independent
props.description: No broker affiliations, no referral commissions, no paid placements. We do not earn a rupee when you open an account.

props.title: Always cited
props.description: Every claim about prices, rules, or returns links to PSX, SECP, FBR, NCCPL, or another source you can verify yourself.
